title: rubus hirtus var. laniger
intro: Rubus hirtus var. laniger, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. laniger are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
